headline: GM Stock Climbs As Former Cruise Team Reportedly Returns To Build Hands-Free Consumer Vehicles
summary: The rehiring comes roughly 18 months after GM effectively shut down Cruise in December 2024, when the company stopped funding the unit’s robotaxi ambitions.

headline: Kinaxis Unveils 2026 Customer Award Winners at Kinexions in Las Vegas
summary: LAS VEGAS, June 04, 2026--Kinaxis® (TSX: KXS), a global leader in end-to-end supply chain planning and orchestration, today announced the winners of its 2026 Customer Awards. Now in their eighth year, these awards were celebrated live at Kinexions North America, the flagship premiere global conference hosted by Kinaxis, bringing together supply chain leaders from around the world.

headline: Ford Bronco Filson edition rekindles 'Eddie Bauer' Explorer vibes, but it's 'not just an appearance package'
